擅长: 新冠、艾滋病、梅毒、水痘、麻疹，猩红热，百日咳，布氏菌病，流行性出血热，结核病，伤寒，疟疾、疟疾、.

codes.title: index.css
codes.content: .frame-parent {	width: 100%;	position: relative;	border-radius: 12px 0px 0px 12px;	background-color: #fff;	display: flex;	flex-direction: column;	align-items: flex-start;	justify-content: center;	padding: 12px;	box-sizing: border-box;	gap: 8px;	text-align: left;	font-size: 12px;	color: #1c58ff;	font-family: 'PingFang SC';}.frame-group {	align-self: stretch;	display: flex;	align-items: flex-start;	gap: 14px;}.ellipse-parent {	align-self: stretch;	display: flex;	flex-direction: column;	align-items: center;	gap: 4px;}.frame-child {	width: 48px;	height: 48px;	position: relative;	border-radius: 50%;	object-fit: cover;	flex-shrink: 0;}.wrapper {	border-radius: 3px;	border: 0.5px solid rgba(79, 125, 254, 0.5);	display: flex;	align-items: center;	justify-content: center;	padding: 2px 4px;	flex-shrink: 0;}.div {	position: relative;	line-height: 120%;}.frame-container {	flex: 1;	display: flex;	flex-direction: column;	align-items: flex-start;	padding: 2px 0px;	gap: 8px;	font-size: 11px;	color: #0e42d2;}.frame-div {	align-self: stretch;	display: flex;	align-items: center;	justify-content: space-between;	gap: -69px;	flex-shrink: 0;}.parent {	display: flex;	align-items: center;	gap: 5px;	font-size: 17px;	color: #333;}.div4 {	position: relative;	line-height: 100%;	font-weight: 500;}.div5 {	position: relative;	font-size: 13px;	line-height: 14px;	color: #86909c;}.rate-parent {	display: flex;	align-items: center;	font-size: 9.47px;	color: #954646;}.rate {	display: flex;	align-items: center;	gap: 1px;	flex-shrink: 0;}.itemrate24 {	height: 14.2px;	width: 14.2px;	position: relative;}.star-filled-icon {	position: absolute;	height: 100%;	width: 100%;	top: 0%;	right: 0%;	bottom: 0%;	left: 0%;	max-width: 100%;	overflow: hidden;	max-height: 100%;}.frame-parent2 {	align-self: stretch;	display: flex;	align-items: center;	gap: 4px;	flex-shrink: 0;	font-size: 13px;	color: #666;}.wrapper2 {	display: flex;	align-items: baseline;}.div7 {	position: relative;	line-height: 14px;	color: #e5e5e5;}.group {	display: flex;	align-items: baseline;	gap: 6px;}.div8 {	position: relative;	line-height: 14px;	flex-shrink: 0;}.frame-parent3 {	width: 205px;	height: 20px;	position: relative;	flex-shrink: 0;	color: #a4702a;}.frame-wrapper {	position: absolute;	top: 0px;	left: 0px;	width: 205px;	height: 23px;	overflow-x: auto;	flex-shrink: 0;}.frame-parent4 {	position: absolute;	top: 0px;	left: 0px;	display: flex;	align-items: center;	gap: 4px;	flex-shrink: 0;}.wrapper3 {	border-radius: 24px;	background-color: #fff8ea;	display: flex;	align-items: center;	justify-content: center;	padding: 2px 8px;}.div9 {	position: relative;	letter-spacing: 0.03em;	line-height: 144%;}.frame-item {	position: absolute;	top: 0px;	right: 0px;	background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), #fff);	width: 12px;	height: 20px;	flex-shrink: 0;}.wrapper6 {	align-self: stretch;	display: flex;	flex-direction: column;	align-items: flex-start;	color: #86909c;}.div12 {	align-self: stretch;	position: relative;	line-height: 150%;	display: -webkit-inline-box;	align-items: center;	overflow: hidden;	text-overflow: ellipsis;	-webkit-line-clamp: 2;	-webkit-box-orient: vertical;}
